name: James Carville
subject: There’s a pretty good joke in this email
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a campaign supported by more than one million grassroots donors
body:
Last week was a little crazy | Friend --

Donald Trump has a lot to say about Hillary: He calls her disgusting, he calls her unqualified, he says she’s not strong enough to be president.

As far as I’m concerned, he can call her anything he wants -- as long as he calls her to concede this election on November 8th.

It’s been a hell of a week for our campaign -- with our four big wins last Tuesday, we’re getting close to locking up this nomination. Now we’ve got to build an apparatus that can take Trump on and take him down.

**Can Hillary count on you to chip in $1 to help build a campaign that can win? (We’ll send you a free bumper sticker when you make your first donation today!) Give now, and I’ll call you what you are -- the backbone of this team:** [ | | [**Donate $1**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjUzODk1MzMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAwMzgxOTc0S0&mt=1&rt=0)
--- ](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjUzODk1MzMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAwMzgxOTc0S0&mt=1&rt=0)
Give 'em hell,

Carville

**Hillary needs you now more than ever -- chip in $1 to join more than one million grassroots donors standing with her:**

| [ | [**Donate $1**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=MjUzODk1MzMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAwMzgxOTc0S0&mt=1&rt=0)
--- ](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=MjUzODk1MzMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAwMzgxOTc0S0&mt=1&rt=0)

| Paid for by Hillary for America, a campaign supported by more than one million grassroots donors.
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjUzODk1MzMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAwMzgxOTc0S0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! If you'd like more information on key policies, visit [hillaryclinton.com/issues](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjUzODk1MzMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAwMzgxOTc0S0&mt=1&rt=0). Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjUzODk1MzMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAwMzgxOTc0S0&mt=1&rt=0) to receive less email and click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjUzODk1MzMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAwMzgxOTc0S0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjUzODk1MzMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAwMzgxOTc0S0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjUzODk1MzMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAwMzgxOTc0S0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjUzODk1MzMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAwMzgxOTc0S0&mt=1&rt=0). Puedes encontrar más información sobre la campaña de Hillary en español [aquí](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjUzODk1MzMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAwMzgxOTc0S0&mt=1&rt=0). If you're still reading this, you must be a really dedicated Hillary supporter. [Yee-haw for you](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjUzODk1MzMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAwMzgxOTc0S0&mt=1&rt=0)! Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjUzODk1MzMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAwMzgxOTc0S0&mt=1&rt=0)

name: Team Van Hollen
subject: need you to read this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
| Did you see Sheila's email? Chris is counting on us. We cannot afford to take the general election for granted -- after all, just two years ago Maryland elected a Republican Governor.

**[Can you help us launch the next phase of this Senate campaign? Donate $25 or whatever you can right now to ensure we send Chris to the Senate in November to work for all of us.](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91d00/70cdc2ba/47e3a8c1/396dc46/3091094029/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh-keep-fighting-may16?refcode=em50316&amount=25.00&recurring=true&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+Can+you+help+us+launch+the+next+phase+of&utm_campaign=em050316&source=em050316")**

\--- Original Message ---

>
> Friend,
>
> Just last Tuesday, Chris won the Democratic Primary with strong support from all across our state. That victory was due to supporters like you who stepped up and got involved in this important election year.
>
> We have one more hurdle to get Chris to the U.S. Senate. With your help, we are going to keep fighting for every vote until the November general election. I know you'll be fighting just as hard by our side.
>
> **[If you're standing with Chris, can you please chip in to our Victory Fund right now to ensure we keep this seat Blue and send Chris to the Senate in November?](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91d00/70cdc2ba/47e3a8c1/396dc47/3091094029/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh-keep-fighting-may16?refcode=em50316&amount=25.00&recurring=true&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+If+yoursquore+standing+with+Chris+can+yo&utm_campaign=em050316&source=em050316")** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[Donate $15 to stand with Chris>>>](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91d00/70cdc2ba/47e3a8c1/396dc44/3091094029/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh-keep-fighting-may16?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=em050316&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=3+-+Donate+15+to+stand+with+Chris+gtgtgt&utm_campaign=em050316&source=em050316")** **[Donate $25 to stand with Chris>>>](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91d00/70cdc2ba/47e3a8c1/396dc45/3091094029/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh-keep-fighting-may16?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em050316&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=4+-+Donate+25+to+stand+with+Chris+gtgtgt&utm_campaign=em050316&source=em050316")** **[Donate $50 to stand with Chris>>>](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91d00/70cdc2ba/47e3a8c1/396dc42/3091094029/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh-keep-fighting-may16?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em050316&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=5+-+Donate+50+to+stand+with+Chris+gtgtgt&utm_campaign=em050316&source=em050316")** **[Donate $100 to stand with Chris>>>](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91d00/70cdc2ba/47e3a8c1/396dc43/3091094029/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh-keep-fighting-may16?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em050316&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=6+-+Donate+100+to+stand+with+Chris+gtgtgt&utm_campaign=em050316&source=em050316")** **[Donate $250 to stand with Chris>>>](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91d00/70cdc2ba/47e3a8c1/396dc40/3091094029/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh-keep-fighting-may16?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=em050316&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=7+-+Donate+250+to+stand+with+Chris+gtgtgt&utm_campaign=em050316&source=em050316")** **[Or, donate another amount to stand with Chris>>>](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91d00/70cdc2ba/47e3a8c1/396dc41/3091094029/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh-keep-fighting-may16?refcode=em050316&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=8+-+Or+donate+another+amount+to+stand+with+C&utm_campaign=em050316&source=em050316")** This has been an unpredictable political year in our country (to put it mildly). No one can afford to take anything for granted in November -- and we certainly will not.
>
> Together we've come so far together and achieved so much. I know we'll meet this next challenge together as well.
>
> Thank you,
>
> Sheila O'Connell
> Campaign Manager
> Chris Van Hollen For Senate | ****[DONATE](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91d00/70cdc2ba/47e3a8c1/396dc5e/3091094029/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh-keep-fighting-may16?refcode=em50316&amount=25.00&recurring=true&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=9+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=em050316&source=em050316")****
> ---
>
>

Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate

name: BernieSanders.com
subject: This news will probably anger you
body:
#
Sisters and Brothers -
I want to share something with you that is probably going to make you angry, but then I am going to give you an opportunity to do something about it.
For months, you've heard the Clinton campaign endlessly repeat in interviews and on social media that they have raised millions and millions of dollars for state parties through something called the "Hillary Victory Fund." They've even used it as an attack line to insinuate Bernie wasn't willing to help down-ballot Democrats.
**Well, yesterday morning, thanks to a Politico investigation, we found out that less than 1 percent of the $61 million raised by the Victory Fund has stayed in state party coffers. And indeed, the majority of the money spent by the Victory Fund has gone to benefit Hillary Clinton's primary campaign against us. The piece said some state party fundraisers believe they are basically acting as "money laundering conduits."**
There's more, but first let me get to the part where you can take action. In recent weeks, the Clinton campaign has expressed a lot of interest in what is important to Bernie's supporters. Here's your chance to send a message about our distaste for big-money in politics:
**[Sign our petition calling on the Clinton campaign to stop bending campaign finance rules to their breaking point, and immediately transfer all the money allowable to the state parties participating in the "Hillary Victory Fund."](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/victory-fund?source=em160503-sub-d&utm_medium=email&utm_source=jeffweaver&utm_campaign=victory-fund&utm_content=petition "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/victory-fund?source=em160503-sub-d&utm_medium=email&utm_source=jeffweaver&utm_campaign=victory-fund&utm_content=petition")**
Here's how the scheme works for the Clinton campaign:
Rich people like Alice Walton of Walmart who have already contributed the maximum amount allowable to the Clinton campaign can contribute an additional $350,000-plus to the Victory Fund.
The first $33,400 of her contribution is supposed to go the DNC, and the rest divided up between participating state parties. But that's not what's been happening. The Victory Fund has mostly been doing one of two things with Ms. Walton's money:
1\. Taking that money and spending it on advertisements and small-dollar fundraising solicitations. Then they take all the small-dollar contributions and data reaped from Alice Walton's contribution and transfer it directly to the Clinton campaign. This tactic is basically a way for them to benefit from a contribution much larger than the legal limit from Alice Walton.
2\. They take Alice Walton's money and transfer it to state parties, who then immediately transfer it to the DNC. Often times they do it without the state party even knowing because the Clinton campaign controls many of the bank accounts involved. So at the end of the day, most of the state parties have received exactly $0 from their Victory Fund arrangement.
**So, now that we know the Clinton campaign is taking advantage of state parties to skirt fundraising limits on her presidential campaign, it's time for her to do the right thing and let the state parties keep their fair share of the cash:**
**[Sign our petition calling on the Clinton campaign to stop bending campaign finance rules to their breaking point, and immediately transfer all the money allowable to the state parties participating in the "Hillary Victory Fund."](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/victory-fund?source=em160503-sub-d&utm_medium=email&utm_source=jeffweaver&utm_campaign=victory-fund&utm_content=petition "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/victory-fund?source=em160503-sub-d&utm_medium=email&utm_source=jeffweaver&utm_campaign=victory-fund&utm_content=petition")**
It's unfortunate that Hillary Clinton has benefited from tens of millions of dollars in cash transfers and advertising to campaign against us in the primary. But it's not too late for her campaign to do the right thing by the state parties we're going to need to win elections up and down the ticket this November.
I'm sure if you sign our petition, that is something they will notice.
In solidarity,
Jeff Weaver
Campaign Manager
Bernie 2016
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=su160503-transfer-the-cash "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=su160503-transfer-the-cash")**

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902 "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").

name: Beth Hansen, Campaign Manager
subject: It's up to us
body:
Sen. Ted Cruz just dropped out of the presidential race and it's
up to us to stop Trump and unify our party in time to defeat
Hillary Clinton.

Peter - Sen. Ted Cruz just
dropped out of the presidential race and it's up to us to stop
Trump and unify our party in time to defeat Hillary Clinton.
17 polls in a row show the same
thing: Gov. John Kasich is the ONLY Republican who can defeat
Hillary Clinton.
Help us raise the funds RIGHT NOW
to expand our grassroots programs for the upcoming primaries:

>> CHIP IN $25 <<

>> CHIP IN $50 <<

>> CHIP IN $100 <<

>> CHIP IN $250 <<

Peter - are you with us?

Thank you for your ongoing
support!
Beth Hansen
Campaign Manager
JohnKasich.com

DONATE

Paid for by Kasich
for America
www.JohnKasich.com

name: Chris Van Hollen (Personal)
subject: grassroots
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
| Friend- Together we've run a grassroots campaign that's put a progressive agenda for action at the forefront.

You and I understand that a people powered campaign like ours can be a powerful force for change. Now is the time to build on what we have accomplished and engage others in this movement.

In the next few months we need to get our message out to every voter in every part of Maryland. To do that, I'll need your help.

[**Please use this personalized link to give whatever you can right now to help us build an even broader and stronger grassroots campaign for the November election.**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91d0e/70cdc2ba/47e22a73/396dc24/1827935924/VEsH/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/-2de91e03/-70ccbb61/47874822/396dd05/793787327/VEsH/?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+Please+use+this+personalized+link+to+giv&utm_campaign=em050316_2&source=em050316_2")

I'm very proud of all we have done together and all I know we can do when we get to the U.S. Senate.

Thank you,

Chris
---

Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
---
We believe that emails are a vital way to stay in direct contact with supporters. You're receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com. [**Click here**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91d0e/70cdc2ba/47e22a73/396dc25/1827935924/VEsE/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/unsubscribe?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+Click+here&utm_campaign=em050316_2&source=em050316_2") if you'd like to unsubscribe from these messages. Please enter dpwillis67@gmail.com to ensure that we are able to unsubscribe you from our list.

name: HillaryClinton.com
subject: This is bogus
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a campaign supported by more than one million grassroots donors
body:
If I had a dollar for every time he said this | Friend --

Donald Trump spent the weekend repeating his assertion that Hillary has only gotten this far in the election because she’s a woman. Trump told CNN's Chris Cuomo, "If she didn't play the woman card, she would have no chance whatsoever of winning."

It's bogus, and it's insulting -- and it's only the beginning of the smears Trump's going to throw Hillary's way if he gets the Republican nomination.

**We have to be ready to protect our candidate and take Trump on. Chip in $1 today and let Hillary know you’ll be fighting by her side all the way to the White House:** [ | | [**Donate $1**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjUzOTkyNjUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAwNTU3MzA3S0&mt=1&rt=0)
--- ](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjUzOTkyNjUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAwNTU3MzA3S0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thank you,

Robby

Robby Mook
Campaign Manager
Hillary for America

**Hillary needs you now more than ever -- chip in $1 to join more than one million grassroots donors standing with her:**

| [ | [**Donate $1**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=MjUzOTkyNjUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAwNTU3MzA3S0&mt=1&rt=0)
--- ](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=MjUzOTkyNjUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAwNTU3MzA3S0&mt=1&rt=0)

| Paid for by Hillary for America, a campaign supported by more than one million grassroots donors.
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjUzOTkyNjUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAwNTU3MzA3S0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! If you'd like more information on key policies, visit [hillaryclinton.com/issues](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjUzOTkyNjUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAwNTU3MzA3S0&mt=1&rt=0). Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjUzOTkyNjUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAwNTU3MzA3S0&mt=1&rt=0) to receive less email and click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjUzOTkyNjUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAwNTU3MzA3S0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjUzOTkyNjUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAwNTU3MzA3S0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjUzOTkyNjUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAwNTU3MzA3S0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjUzOTkyNjUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAwNTU3MzA3S0&mt=1&rt=0). Puedes encontrar más información sobre la campaña de Hillary en español [aquí](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjUzOTkyNjUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAwNTU3MzA3S0&mt=1&rt=0). If you're still reading this, you must be a really dedicated Hillary supporter. [Yee-haw for you](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjUzOTkyNjUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAwNTU3MzA3S0&mt=1&rt=0)! Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjUzOTkyNjUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAwNTU3MzA3S0&mt=1&rt=0)
